title: Generated Meteo Metrics
description: JSON representation of all InfluxDB points generated by meteo-server. The application writes line protocol, but this schema documents the equivalent structured metric contract.

timestampNs.description: InfluxDB point timestamp in nanoseconds since Unix epoch.

station_id.description: Authenticated station identifier from the incoming Wunderground-compatible request.

meteo_temperature_celsius.description: Outdoor temperature converted from station tempf, in degrees Celsius.

meteo_dew_point_celsius.description: Dew point converted from station dewptf, in degrees Celsius.

meteo_indoor_temperature_celsius.description: Indoor temperature converted from station indoortempf, in degrees Celsius.

meteo_humidity_percent.description: Outdoor relative humidity reported by the station, in percent.

meteo_indoor_humidity_percent.description: Indoor relative humidity reported by the station, in percent.

meteo_pressure_hpa.description: Barometric pressure converted from station baromin, in hectopascals.

meteo_wind_speed_ms.description: Average wind speed converted from station windspeedmph, in metres per second.

meteo_wind_gust_ms.description: Wind gust speed converted from station windgustmph, in metres per second.

meteo_wind_speed_kmh.description: Average wind speed converted from station windspeedmph, in kilometres per hour.

meteo_wind_gust_kmh.description: Wind gust speed converted from station windgustmph, in kilometres per hour.

meteo_wind_direction_degrees.description: Wind direction in meteorological degrees, where 0/360 is north and 90 is east.

meteo_rain_mm.description: Rainfall in the last 60 minutes converted from station rainin, in millimetres.

meteo_rain_daily_mm.description: Rainfall since local midnight converted from station dailyrainin, in millimetres.

meteo_solar_radiation_wm2.description: Solar radiation reported by the station, in watts per square metre.

meteo_uv_index.description: UV index reported by the station.

meteo_feels_like_celsius.description: Apparent temperature in degrees Celsius. Uses heat index, wind chill, or outdoor temperature depending on conditions.

meteo_wet_bulb_temperature_celsius.description: Wet-bulb temperature in degrees Celsius, computed with the Stull approximation.

meteo_absolute_humidity_gm3.description: Absolute humidity in grams per cubic metre.

meteo_cloud_base_meters.description: Estimated cloud base height in metres, using the 125 m per degree Celsius lifting condensation level rule.

meteo_weather_score.description: Local outdoor comfort score from 0 to 100. Penalizes temperature discomfort, humidity extremes, wind, rain, UV, AQI and active CHMI warnings.

meteo_sensor_anomaly_dew_point_above_tem.description: 1 when dew point is physically suspiciously above outdoor temperature.

meteo_sensor_anomaly_wind_gust_below_spe.description: 1 when reported wind gust is below average wind speed.

meteo_sensor_anomaly_solar_at_night.description: 1 when solar radiation is reported while the clear-sky model says the sun is below the horizon.

meteo_sensor_anomaly_update_gap.description: 1 when the previous accepted station update was more than 120 seconds earlier.

meteo_sensor_anomaly_temperature_jump.description: 1 when outdoor temperature changes by more than 5 °C between near-consecutive accepted updates.

meteo_sensor_anomaly_pressure_jump.description: 1 when pressure changes by more than 3 hPa between near-consecutive accepted updates.

meteo_sensor_update_gap_seconds.description: Seconds since the previous accepted station update as seen by the application. 0 on the first accepted update after process start.

meteo_sensor_anomaly_count.description: Sum of active sensor anomaly flags for the current accepted update.

meteo_sensor_health_score.description: Sensor health score from 0 to 100, subtracting 25 points per active anomaly flag.

meteo_latitude.description: Optional station latitude. Generated when LAT is configured.

meteo_longitude.description: Optional station longitude. Generated when LON is configured.

meteo_solar_radiation_clearsky_wm2.description: Optional clear-sky global horizontal irradiance estimate in watts per square metre. Generated when LAT and LON are configured.

meteo_cloud_cover_index.description: Optional ratio of observed solar radiation to clear-sky radiation, clamped to 0..1. Generated when LAT/LON are configured and clear-sky radiation is at least 20 W/m2.

meteo_temperature_deviation_celsius.description: Optional difference between station outdoor temperature and the latest Open-Meteo forecast temperature, in degrees Celsius.

meteo_forecast_temperature_error_abs_cel.description: Optional absolute outdoor temperature forecast error in degrees Celsius.

meteo_forecast_temperature_quality_score.description: Optional temperature forecast quality score from 0 to 100. 100 means exact; 0 means an error of at least 6 °C.

meteo_wind_speed_deviation_kmh.description: Optional difference between station average wind speed and the latest Open-Meteo wind forecast, in kilometres per hour.

meteo_forecast_wind_error_abs_kmh.description: Optional absolute wind speed forecast error in kilometres per hour.

meteo_forecast_wind_quality_score.description: Optional wind forecast quality score from 0 to 100. 100 means exact; 0 means an error of at least 25 km/h.

meteo_forecast_quality_score.description: Optional combined forecast quality score from 0 to 100, weighted 65% temperature and 35% wind when both are available.

meteo_forecast_temperature_celsius.description: Optional current Open-Meteo forecast temperature in degrees Celsius. Generated after a successful Open-Meteo fetch.

meteo_forecast_wind_speed_kmh.description: Optional current Open-Meteo forecast wind speed in kilometres per hour. Generated after a successful Open-Meteo fetch.

meteo_aqi_european.description: Optional European AQI from Open-Meteo air quality. Generated after a successful Open-Meteo air quality fetch.

meteo_pm25_ugm3.description: Optional PM2.5 concentration from Open-Meteo air quality, in micrograms per cubic metre.

meteo_pm10_ugm3.description: Optional PM10 concentration from Open-Meteo air quality, in micrograms per cubic metre.

meteo_chmi_warning_max_level.description: Optional maximum active CHMI warning level across all events. 0 means none; 1 minor; 2 moderate; 3 severe or extreme.

meteo_station_last_update_timestamp_seco.description: Application-side Unix timestamp in seconds when the station fields were built.

event.description: CHMI/Meteoalarm warning event key. Known pre-seeded events are wind, snow-ice, thunderstorm, fog, high-temperature, low-temperature, forest-fire, avalanches, rain, flooding, and rain-flood. Additional active event names from the feed are also allowed.

meteo_chmi_warning_level.description: CHMI warning level for this event. 0 means none; 1 minor; 2 moderate; 3 severe or extreme.
